items.title: Scenes as Objects, Not Primitives: Instance-Structured 3D Tokenization from Unposed Views
items.abstract: A 3D scene is understood through its objects, not the primitives that compose them. Yet feed-forward reconstruction methods output dense, unstructured sets of points or Gaussians, leaving object-level
